core_skills: Large language models, Prompt engineering, Backend development, Data processing, SQL
skill_match_scores: Large language models:1.0, Prompt engineering:1.0, Backend development:1.0, Data processing:1.0, SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: Degree in Computer Science, Hands-on experience with large language models (GPT, Claude, etc.), Strong technical writing and analytical skills with attention to precision and systematic testing methodologies, Detail-oriented approach to documentation, performance measurement, and systematic experimentation in a fast-paced startup environment, Ability to work out of our San Francisco office
core_responsibilities: Write backend features end to end — data models, business logic, and API integrations that make our product work reliably for customers, Design, version, and systematically test prompts that drive our backend AI agent's financial reasoning and decision-making — measuring accuracy, consistency, and reliability across diverse inputs, Build and maintain production tools that process financial data at scale, Use SQL and our analytics infrastructure to evaluate prompt performance, scraper reliability, and system behavior, Own your implementations end to end, participate in our CI/CD process, and respond to production incidents as needed
job_summary: Grid is a fast-growing company focused on building financial products that help users manage their financial future. They are seeking a Software Engineer to join their backend team, responsible for developing data pipelines and maintaining the prompt logic for their AI-powered financial systems.
